form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr1) over 1730m after showing early speed at Bathurst, at the bell was leading 3.1 beaten 11 m by Willows Girl (2:01.50) in 3yo G2 No NR F on March 28 at $18. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she posted a big 25 m win as favourite (Sr2) at Bendigo (1:55.50) beating Major Bye in 0-1 WIN on December 3 at $1.25. Drawn to advantage and is well placed for a winning return.
